title: Garden Mile Heavy Duty 1.5kg Log Splitter Wedge | Diamond 4-Sided Wood Splitting Tool for Firewood, Kindling & Chopping | Axe-Compatible Splitting Maul for Outdoor Use | Durable Steel Construction
features: Professional-grade log splitter wedge: Heavy-duty 1.5kg diamond-shaped splitting wedge splits logs in 4 directions with one powerful strike. Made from heat-treated drop-forged steel for maximum durability. Perfect for firewood, kindling, and wood burners—eliminates struggling with inadequate tools.

Ultimate wood splitting efficiency: Engineered weighted design with spherical striking face delivers centered blows to split even stubborn logs. Works seamlessly with sledgehammers or mauls. Saves time and energy compared to traditional axes—ideal for DIYers and professionals alike.

Premium forged steel construction: Manufactured from corrosion-resistant, heat-treated steel for years of reliable use. Sharpened cutting edges and reinforced tip split wood logs effortlessly. The perfect firewood splitter for camping, gardens, and wood-burning stoves.

Innovative 4-way splitting action: Diamond-shaped wedge splits logs into perfect kindling with single strikes. Dimensions (160mm x 80mm) optimized for all log sizes. Works as both a wood grenade log splitter and a traditional splitting maul for versatile use.

Time-saving wood processing tool: Eliminates hours of exhausting chopping—transforms large logs into fire-ready wood in seconds. Pairs perfectly with hammers for effortless splitting. Essential for anyone with wood burners, fire pits, or needing quality kindling
description: The Garden Mile Heavy Duty 1.5kg Log Splitter Wedge is the ultimate tool for effortlessly splitting firewood, kindling, and logs. Featuring a diamond-shaped 4-sided design, it splits wood in multiple directions with a single strike, saving you time and energy. Made from heat-treated, drop-forged steel, this rugged wedge resists corrosion and lasts for years. Perfect for use with sledgehammers or mauls, it’s ideal for wood burners, fire pits, camping, and outdoor firewood prep. The weighted 1.5kg design ensures powerful, centered strikes, making it far more efficient than traditional axes. Whether you're a DIY enthusiast, gardener, or professional, this wood grenade-style splitter handles even the toughest logs with ease
